title: Create: Extra Structures
description: This Mod adds structures for the create mod, this is my first upload, so don't expect the mod to be amazing. required mods: The create mod, Create TFMG, valkyrien skies clockwork, trackwork, valkyrien skies eureka and Create big cannons.
body:
This mod adds a few structures that integrate with Create, valkyrien skies, trackwork, clockwork, copycats+ and the factory must grow.

- So far the mod includes:
- A ruined car
- A ruined Pumpjack (only found in badlands biomes)
- A crashed plane
- A ruined steam engine
- A ruined interdimensional train
- Expect more soon......

This is my first public mod, so don't expect it to be extremely well made, but I tried my best to make the builds at least decent.
